FAQ.title: Answers before you need to ask
FAQ.description: Find clear guidance about skills, MCP delivery, billing, security, and your OceanSkill workspace.
FAQ.noResults: No matching answer yet. Ask OceanGuide below and we will point you to the closest resource.

items.question: What is OceanSkill?
items.answer: OceanSkill is a curated marketplace for production-ready AI agent skills. You can evaluate public metadata, compatibility, and releases before securely using protected skill content through MCP.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Create an account, open your dashboard, generate an OceanSkill access key, then add the MCP server configuration to your supported AI agent client.

items.question: What does MCP do in OceanSkill?
items.answer: MCP lets your AI client discover tools and request protected skill content at runtime. OceanSkill validates your key, permissions, and available usage before returning content.

items.question: Where can I see MCP usage?
items.answer: The dashboard Usage area shows how many MCP calls your account has made. Each successful protected request is recorded as a usage event.

items.question: How should I choose a skill?
items.answer: Compare the skill's supported clients, license, release status, category, and readiness signals. Related skills on each detail page help you compare alternatives in the same category.

items.question: Why is the full SKILL.md not public?
items.answer: Public pages expose enough metadata to evaluate a skill, while protected instructions are delivered only after authenticated authorization. This protects creators and avoids accidental indexing of private content.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Credits represent available protected usage. A request is accepted only when your account and access key are valid and your balance or entitlement permits the call.

items.question: How are access keys protected?
items.answer: Access is validated server-side and account data is isolated with Supabase Postgres Row Level Security. Treat keys like passwords: do not place them in public repositories or browser code.

items.question: Which AI clients can use OceanSkill?
items.answer: Skills declare their compatible clients, such as Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or other MCP-capable tools. Check the compatibility list on each skill detail page.

FAQ.askDescription: OceanGuide searches the curated OceanSkill knowledge base and links you to the most relevant page. It does not invent account or billing data.
